name: Passover Bagels
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil. In the boiling water, add peanut oil, sugar, and salt. Stir in matzo meal.
2. Boil for an additional 2 minutes, then remove from heat. Mix thoroughly and let cool slightly.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time until well combined.
4. Grease your hands with a little oil.
5. Form the dough into two-inch balls.
6. Place the balls on a greased cookie sheet.
7. Dip your finger in water and press a hole in the center of each ball.
8. Bake at 375°F for 1 hour.
